lines.en_lit: Thoughts of transgression are worse than transgression and your mnemonic is the odor of meat. the end of summer is more oppressive than the summer and your mnemonic is a heated oven.
A fever in winter is more powerful than in summer, and your mnemonic is a cold oven. Relearning old is more difficult than learning from new And your mnemonic is mortar from mortar.

Rabbi Abbahu said: What is the rationale Rabbi as it is written: “For the leader, about the morning hind” just as the antlers of a hind branch out to here and to there, so too, dawn diffuses to here and to there.

Rabbi Zeira said: Why is Esther likened to a hind? to tell you: Just as a hind its womb is narrow and it is desirable to its mate at each and every hour like the first hour, so too, Esther was desirable to Ahasuerus at each and every hour like the first hour. Rabbi Asi said: Why was Esther likened to the dawn? to tell you: Just as the dawn is the conclusion of the entire night, so too, Esther was the conclusion of all miracles

But isn’t there Hanukkah, was granted to write we are saying That well according to the one who said: was granted to write Esther However, according to the one who said: was not granted to write Esther what can be said?

establishes in accordance with Rabbi Binyamin bar Yefet that Rabbi Elazar said; as Rabbi Binyamin bar Yefet said Rabbi Elazar said: Why are the prayers of the righteous likened to a hind? to tell you: Just as a hind, as long as it grows its antlers they branch out; so too, the righteous, as long as they more in prayer their prayer is heard.
they slaughtered the daily offering When If we say during the rest of the days of the year, is there no alternative the High Priest? Rather, on Yom Kippur, is there moonlight?
this is what is saying: And on Yom Kippur, when said: The light flashed, they led the High Priest down to the Hall of Immersion.

the father of Rabbi Avin taught Not only this, did they say; rather, even the pinching of the a bird and the taking of the handful of a meal-offering at night, be burned. Granted, a bird a burnt-offering what was, was. However, the handful
